---
title: Consistent Hashing Deep Dive
author: DistSys
date: 2024-02-26
description: How consistent hashing enables scalable distributed storage
tags: ["#distributed", "#architecture"]
---
How consistent hashing enables scalable distributed storage. When nodes join or leave, only a fraction of keys need to be remapped.

**Key properties:**
- Minimal disruption on topology changes
- Virtual nodes for load balancing
- Used in DynamoDB, Cassandra, and many P2P systems
